message:
test(fj-conformance): add 32 oracle tests for Sign primitive

Comprehensive conformance tests for Primitive::Sign:
- Integer positive/negative/zero: sign(5)=1, sign(-5)=-1, sign(0)=0
- Float positive/negative/zero with edge cases
- Infinity: sign(+inf)=1, sign(-inf)=-1
- Zero signs: sign(+0.0)=+0.0, sign(-0.0)=-0.0 (sign preserved)
- NaN: sign(NaN)=NaN
- i64::MIN and i64::MAX edge cases
- Very small/large magnitudes (1e-100, 1e100)
- 1D, 2D, 3D tensor shapes with mixed values
- Mathematical identities: sign(x)*|x|=x, sign(sign(x))=sign(x)

Previously only 3 tests existed in lax_oracle.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
